_comment: 3-minute demo narration. Each segment: id, act, text (spoken), caption (on-screen), scene (what the recorder shows), diagram (optional architecture-diagram pop-up). Timings are derived from the generated audio, not hardcoded.
title: Mend — the accessibility healer

segments.text: This is Mend. It repairs website accessibility in the source code, and it refuses to believe itself.
segments.caption: Mend — the accessibility healer

segments.text: Hand a naive agent a page and tell it to fix accessibility, and this is what you get. The violation counter drops, but watch: it just deleted the login buttons and hid the label. The counter lies.
segments.caption: Act 1 — the naive loop games the counter

segments.text: Claude can write the fix. Only a harness can prove it. We built the proof.
segments.caption: The model is the commodity. The harness is the product.

segments.text: Mend scans with axe, maps each violation back to the exact source line, patches the source, and then every fix must survive four gates before it counts.
segments.caption: scan → map → patch → verify

segments.text: Gate one: the violation is gone and none were introduced. Gate two: not a single pixel moved, so the design is untouched. Gate three: no suppression tricks. Gate four: an independent second engine agrees.
segments.caption: 4 gates · axe · pixel-diff · banned-patterns · IBM Equal Access

segments.text: For anything semantic, like alt text or a label, an independent critic on Akash judges whether the fix is actually true. A different model family, on different hardware, so the fixer can never grade its own homework.
segments.caption: Independent critic — open model on Akash

segments.text: And here is the moment that matters. A fix tries to hide a violation instead of fixing it. The harness catches it and reverts it, live. That revert is the product.
segments.caption: Caught & reverted — the revert is the product

segments.text: Every fix, accepted or reverted, ships a receipt: the before and after, the exact patch, all four gate results, and the critic's verdict.
segments.caption: Every fix ships a receipt

segments.text: Then the agent deploys the healed site itself, to a live link, through Zero, paying nothing. The cured patient ships itself.
segments.caption: Agent self-deploys via Zero — live, $0

segments.text: We fix verified violations, and we hand you the evidence. Mend.
segments.caption: We fix verified violations. We hand you the evidence.
